channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Zimbabwe receives its first MD-530F, a U.S.-made aircraft built for combat and civilian missions

item.title: Police working ‘flat out’ to locate, apprehend UK triple murder suspect
item.description: Zimbabwe ready to cooperate with UK police through Interpol The post Police working ‘flat out’ to locate, apprehend UK triple murder suspect appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. (via Zimbabwean News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: MDC petitions ConCourt to nullify Mnangagwa term extension

item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Zimbabwe clinch ODI series in thriller @3menonaboat
item.description:
Ben Curran makes history for Zimbabwe

The post Zimbabwe clinch ODI series in thriller first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: Total Eclipse of the Heart singer Bonnie Tyler dies aged 75
item.description: Singer Bonnie Tyler, known for hits including Total Eclipse of the Heart, Holding Out for a Hero and It’s a Heartache, has died at the age of 75. A message posted on the official website, external for the hugely popular Welsh power ballad diva read: “Bonnie’s family and team are heartbroken to announce that Bonnie [...] The post Total Eclipse of the Heart singer Bonnie Tyler dies aged 75 appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Air Zimbabwe resumes direct Harare-London flights from July 22
item.description: Airline announces promotional fares as it returns to the route since 2011 The post Air Zimbabwe resumes direct Harare-London flights from July 22 appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. (via Zimbabwean News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Air Zimbabwe Announces London Return Date, Sets Promotional Prices @263Chat
item.description: The London route was once among Air Zimbabwe’s flagship international services, linking Zimbabwe directly with the United Kingdom, home to one of the country’s largest diaspora communities and an important source market for tourism, business travel and investment. The post Air Zimbabwe Announces London Return Date, Sets Promotional Prices appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: From KwaZulu To Harare: Zulu Kings Drag Mnangagwa Into Migration Crisis
item.description: Tinashe Sambiri| Plans by AmaZulu King Misuzulu ka Zwelithini and King Ndamase Ndamase of Western Pondoland to meet President Emmerson... Continue reading "From KwaZulu To Harare: Zulu Kings Drag Mnangagwa Into Migration Crisis" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Ex-CIO director general questioned by police over ‘death threat’
item.description: HARARE – Sacked Central Intelligence Organisation director general Fulton Mangwanya was questioned by police in Harare on Wednesday, allegedly over threats of murder made while he was in office. Police allegedly attempted to arrest Mangwanya on Tuesday night but the former chief spy eluded them. He presented himself at Harare Central Police Station on Wednesday [...] The post Ex-CIO director general questioned by police over ‘death threat’ appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Zimbabwe coalition plans nationwide mass action over constitutional amendments @nehandaradio
item.description: A coalition of churches, civic groups, labour unions and opposition leaders has announced plans for nationwide peaceful mass action to challenge Zimbabwe’s new constitutional amendments. The post Zimbabwe coalition plans nationwide mass action over constitutional amendments appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Mnangagwa’s Broke Administration Leans on Diaspora Cash as Economy Continues to Struggle
item.description: Tinashe Sambiri| Zimbabwe’s struggling economy continues to rely heavily on money sent home by citizens living abroad, with critics arguing... Continue reading "Mnangagwa’s Broke Administration Leans on Diaspora Cash as Economy Continues to Struggle" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Mbinga Wanted For Triple Murder: Millionaire Property Boss Kills Wife and 2 Daughters in UK Then Dramatically Flees to Zimbabwe
item.description: UK Triple Murder Suspect Flees: Shock as Zimbabwe man kills his wife and two daughters in UK then flees back home Bedford, UK – An international manhunt is currently underway for Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, a 45-year-old man suspected of the brutal murder of his wife and two daughters in Bedfordshire, United Kingdom. The alleged flight [...] The post Mbinga Wanted For Triple Murder: Millionaire Property Boss Kills Wife and 2 Daughters in UK Then Dramatically Flees to Zimbabwe first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Wicknell Chivayo Meets King Mswati III, Gives Update on Eswatini Solar Project @wicknellchivayo
item.description: Wicknell Chivayo Meets King Mswati III, Gives Update on Eswatini Solar Project Zimbabwean businessman Wicknell Chivayo says his company, Intratrek Holdings, is moving ahead with plans for a major solar energy project in Eswatini after receiving what he described as a royal welcome from King Mswati III. Chivayo shared details of his visit on his [...] The post Wicknell Chivayo Meets King Mswati III, Gives Update on Eswatini Solar Project appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Citizens Coalition Vows To Confront Mnangagwa Over CAB3

item.title: Ex-CIO chief Fulton Mangwanya questioned by police over alleged death threats @nehandaradio
item.description: Former CIO director-general Fulton Mangwanya was questioned by police in Harare over allegations that he threatened a businessman and his family while in office. The post Ex-CIO chief Fulton Mangwanya questioned by police over alleged death threats appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Re-industrialisation Requires More Than Factories: Zimbabwe Must Reform Its Currency, Financial System and Corporate Leadership Model
item.description: Zimbabwe’s renewed focus on re-industrialisation is both necessary and timely. The Zimbabwe Re-industrialisation Conference represents an important recognition that sustainable economic development cannot be achieved without rebuilding productive capacity, strengthening manufacturing, promoting value addition and creating globally competitive industries. A country cannot consume its way to prosperity; it must produce, innovate and export. By Brighton [...] The post Re-industrialisation Requires More Than Factories: Zimbabwe Must Reform Its Currency, Financial System and Corporate Leadership Model appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail
